---
title : "The Conundrum of Sharing Research Data"
date : "2012-06-01"
author : ["Christine L. Borgman"]
categories : ["Journal Article"]
publication : "Journal of the American Society for Information Science and Technology, 63(6) 1059--1078  [https://doi.org/10.1002/asi.22634](https://doi.org/10.1002/asi.22634)"
publication_short : "Journal of the American Society for Information Science and Technology, 63(6) 1059--1078  [https://doi.org/10.1002/asi.22634](https://doi.org/10.1002/asi.22634)"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Christine L. Borgman (2012). *The Conundrum of Sharing Research Data*. Journal of the American Society for Information Science and Technology, 63(6) 1059--1078  [https://doi.org/10.1002/asi.22634](https://doi.org/10.1002/asi.22634)

:::
